name: Failures-only filter narrows the loop to iterations that caught a failure
description: Toggling the failures-only filter reduces the iteration log to just the iterations whose loop caught and fixed a test failure, and toggling it off restores the full list.

planSteps.description: Verify the ITERATION LOG initially lists many iterations (ten entries), including some marked pass with no failure and some describing a caught failure
Click the failures-only filter toggle near the loop stats
Verify the ITERATION LOG now shows only the smaller set of iterations that describe a caught failure (each mentioning something that broke), and no longer shows the failure-free iterations
Click the same filter toggle again to turn it off
Verify the ITERATION LOG returns to showing the full list of iterations again
